title: About Pihka
content:
About Pihka

Pihka is a sustainable data publishing platform designed for digital humanities research. It provides tools for creating, managing, and sharing structured datasets in a way that promotes long-term accessibility and reuse.

Key Features

  • Structured Data Management: Pihka allows researchers to organize their data using a flexible schema that can accommodate various types of information.
  • Open Formats: Data published through Pihka is stored in open formats (e.g., SQLite, CSV) to ensure compatibility with a wide range of tools and platforms.
  • Metadata Support: Pihka encourages the use of rich metadata to enhance the discoverability and contextualization of datasets.
  • Version Control: Pihka includes versioning features to track changes to datasets over time, allowing researchers to maintain a history of their work.
  • Collaboration Tools: Pihka supports collaborative data management, enabling multiple researchers to contribute to and curate shared datasets.

Getting Started

To get started with Pihka, you can explore the documentation and tutorials available on our website. We also encourage you to join our community forums to connect with other researchers and share your experiences.
